Class ToolTipHyperlinkEventArgs

Provides data for the HyperlinkClicked event.

object
EventArgs
ToolTipHyperlinkEventArgs

Namespace: PhiRobotics.UI.ToolTips
Assembly: PhiRobotics.UI.dll
Syntax
public class ToolTipHyperlinkEventArgs : EventArgs

Constructors

ToolTipHyperlinkEventArgs(string, string, MouseEventArgs)

Creates a new instance of ToolTipHyperlinkEventArgs with specified arguments.

Declaration
public ToolTipHyperlinkEventArgs(string text, string link, MouseEventArgs args)
Parameters
Type Name Description
string text

A string that represents the hyperlink alt text and is assign to Text.
string link

A string that represents the hyperlink url and is assigned to Link.
MouseEventArgs args

An instance of MouseEventArgs that specifies the mouse coordinates of clicked link and is assigned to MouseArgs.

Properties

Link

Get or sets the URL of the clicked hyperlink.

Declaration
public string Link { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
string

A string that represent the hyperlink url.

MouseArgs

Gets or sets mouse coordinates calculated from the toolbar’s upper left corner.

Declaration
public MouseEventArgs MouseArgs { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
MouseEventArgs

An instance of MouseEventArgs that provides mouse coordinates of the clicked link.

Text

Gets or sets the hyperlink alt text.

Declaration
public string Text { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
string

A string that represents the hyperlink alt text.
